user.title: Dominion Energy South Carolina
user.description: Enter your Dominion Energy SC account credentials.

select_delivery.title: Two-Factor Authentication
select_delivery.description: Choose how to receive your verification code.

enter_otp.title: Enter Verification Code
enter_otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your device.

select_account.title: Select Account
select_account.description: Multiple accounts were found. Select the account to add.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Dominion Energy SC
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your credentials again.

error.invalid_otp: The verification code is incorrect or has expired.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Dominion Energy SC. Check your internet connection.
error.no_accounts: No accounts were found for this login.
